text:
AI Platform Leadership & Measurable Impact
Building an Enterprise AI Platform

Taixing served as the primary technical owner, an end-to-end AI platform designed to deliver grounded, production-grade AI experiences using private knowledge, public web information, and GitHub repositories.
Rather than building a standalone chatbot, he architected and implemented a complete AI ecosystem spanning retrieval, orchestration, model serving, evaluation, and operational infrastructure.
Ownership
Owned the full AI platform lifecycle:

AI platform architecture and technical strategy
Multi-model inference platform design
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture
LLM orchestration and routing systems
Evaluation and quality measurement frameworks
Production deployment and operational reliability
Key AI Systems Delivered
Intelligent LLM Orchestration Layer
Designed a routing system capable of dynamically selecting between:

Private knowledge retrieval
GitHub repository search
Public web search
Direct LLM responses
Implemented model-based routing, query rewriting, confidence scoring, and answer grounding to improve response accuracy while minimizing hallucinations.
Production RAG Platform
Built a multi-stage retrieval architecture combining:

Semantic vector retrieval
Candidate expansion
Cross-encoder reranking
Citation generation
Evidence-grounded answer synthesis
The system supports multiple enterprise knowledge sources while maintaining low-latency user experiences.
AI Evaluation Framework
Developed automated evaluation pipelines to measure:

Routing accuracy
Retrieval relevance
Citation quality
Response grounding
End-to-end answer quality
Created reproducible benchmark datasets and testing workflows that enabled continuous model and prompt improvements.
GPU Inference Platform
Designed and operated self-hosted AI inference infrastructure using:

vLLM
LoRA adapters
Kubernetes
Multi-node GPU deployments
Enabled efficient serving of multiple specialized models from shared GPU resources while maintaining operational flexibility and cost control.

Measurable Impact
Reduced AI Platform Dependency
Built an internally controlled AI platform that reduced reliance on external AI tooling and enabled rapid experimentation with models, prompts, retrieval strategies, and evaluation methods.
Improved Answer Quality
Implemented multi-stage retrieval and reranking pipelines that significantly improved retrieval precision and answer grounding compared with naive vector search approaches.
Increased User Trust
Introduced citation-backed responses and evidence-grounded generation, helping users understand where information originated and reducing hallucination risk.
Accelerated AI Development
Established reusable AI infrastructure components—including orchestration, retrieval, inference, and evaluation layers—that can be leveraged by future AI products and agent-based workflows.
End-to-End Technical Ownership
Led initiatives from concept through production operation, including:

Architecture design
AI system implementation
Infrastructure deployment
Performance optimization
Production support
Demonstrated the ability to independently deliver complex AI systems that combine machine learning infrastructure, distributed systems, retrieval architectures, and production software engineering.
